summary: ⇧⌘V clipboard history picker and Your day analysis now highlight how you reuse clips for key productivity.

introduced: ⇧⌘V opens a floating paste-from-history picker without bringing Nucleus to the front — click outside to dismiss
Your day tracks ⇧⌘V clipboard reuses and highlights your dominant reuse category as key productivity
Dashboard sections for weather, metrics, news, summary, bills, and productivity chart can each be collapsed or expanded
Public holidays show the next nationwide and state holidays together with Apple Intelligence SF Symbol icons
changed: Clipboard history picker only pastes when you select a clip — the shortcut alone opens the list
Your day analysis digest includes ⇧⌘V reuse counts and category breakdown alongside capture analytics
Analysis bar sits below the productivity chart for a clearer reading flow
